description: For the oriental in spirit, the Reebounce fragrance for women from reebok brings back images of mimosas and sunny afternoons. This eau de parfum, bottled in a delectable curved pink flask with a glass top, has tones of jasmine, violets and pineapple right from the Mediterranean. Quantity: 100 ml Caution Flammable Keep away from sources of ignition Keep away from children Do not use near fire, flame or heat Avoid spraying near the eyes
